Description: Disbursement delayed by 15 days due to builder NOC. Customer losing property booking.
Resolution: Builder NOC obtained. Disbursement processed.

Description: NACH mandate bounced for 2nd consecutive month despite sufficient balance.
Resolution: Bank mandate re-registered with correct UMRN. Test debit successful.

Description: Customer lost job. Requesting moratorium or EMI reduction for 6 months.
Resolution: Restructuring proposal submitted to credit committee. Awaiting approval.

Description: Customer requesting rate match with SBI offer of 8.25%.
Resolution: Rate review done. Offered 0.10% concession under retention scheme.

Description: Requesting interest certificate for FY 2024-25 tax filing.
Resolution: Certificate generated and emailed to registered email ID.

Description: LAP application stuck for 20 days pending legal opinion on commercial property.
Customer disputes penal interest charged for 1-day delay in March 2024.
Resolution: Penal interest of INR 1450 reversed as goodwill. Customer informed.

Description: Customer upset about LTV deviation rejection. Wants escalation.
Partial disbursement stuck for 12 days. Technical valuation report not received from empanelled valuer.
Resolution: Valuation report received and approved. Disbursement released.

Description: EMI debited is INR 2300 higher than sanction letter amount after rate reset.
Resolution: Rate reset letter re-issued. EMI recalculated. Excess adjusted in next month.

Description: Customer claims RLLR reset was not communicated before auto-debit of higher EMI.
Resolution: RLLR communication copy shared. Rate confirmed as per schedule. Customer satisfied.

Description: Home loan file logged 18 days ago but no credit manager assigned yet.
Resolution: Credit manager assigned. File moved to processing within 24 hours.

Description: Insurance premium debited at INR 18500 instead of quoted INR 12000.
Resolution: Premium difference of INR 6500 refunded. Correct policy re-issued.

Description: PMAY subsidy of INR 2.67 lakh approved by NHB but not credited to loan account for 60 days.
Resolution: Subsidy traced with NHB. UTR confirmed. Amount credited to loan account.

Description: Balance transfer from ICICI initiated 25 days ago. No status update provided to customer.
Resolution: BT amount disbursed to ICICI. Loan transferred successfully.

Description: Customer charged 2% prepayment penalty on floating rate loan which should be NIL.
Resolution: Penalty of INR 34000 reversed. System flag corrected for floating rate.

Description: Loan closed 45 days ago but original property documents still not returned.
Resolution: Documents retrieved from central vault. Customer collected from branch.

Description: Customer felt disrespected by branch staff during prepayment enquiry. Wants formal apology.
Resolution: Branch manager personally called. Written apology sent. Staff counseled.

Description: Unable to access loan account on HDFC app for 10 days. OTP not received.
Resolution: Mobile number updated in CBS. OTP delivery restored. App access confirmed.

Description: Recovery agent visited home and created scene despite EMI being only 5 days overdue.
Resolution: Recovery agent penalized. Written apology issued. Process violation documented.

Description: Customer had to call 7 times for simple interest certificate. No single point of contact.
Resolution: Certificate issued. RM assigned as single point of contact going forward.

Description: No communication received for 14 days after home loan application submission.
Resolution: Application in technical stage. Regular SMS updates activated for customer.

Description: Two EMIs debited in January. Customer's other commitments bounced due to insufficient funds.
Resolution: Duplicate debit reversed via NEFT same day. Apology letter issued.

Description: Disbursement held up as builder OTC cheque not cleared. Customer paid INR 15 lakh from own funds.
Customer received offer from Kotak at 8.30%. Wants HDFC to match or beat.
Resolution: Offered 8.35% under retention scheme with 0.15% reduction. Customer accepted.

Description: Salaried customer rejected due to irregular salary credits. Wants reconsideration with new bank statements.
Resolution: Re-evaluated with 6-month bank statement. Conditional approval issued.

Description: Life insurance claim filed 90 days ago after co-applicant death. No settlement yet.
Resolution: Claim escalated to insurance company. Settlement approved. Payout in 15 days.

Description: Customer classified under MIG-II instead of EIG. Subsidy difference of INR 1.30 lakh.
Resolution: Category corrected. Revised claim submitted to NHB.

Description: Foreclosure quote from previous lender differs from amount HDFC disbursed. Gap of INR 45000.
Resolution: Difference due to interest accrual between quote date and disbursement. Explanation shared.

Description: Part prepayment of INR 10 lakh done online but not reflecting in outstanding balance.
Resolution: Payment traced. CBS updated. Revised amortization schedule sent.

Description: Original sale deed and share certificate not returned 60 days after NOC issuance.
Resolution: Documents located in Thane vault. Dispatched via registered post.

Description: Customer waited 90 minutes at branch for simple statement collection.
Resolution: Token system being implemented. Separate counter for simple requests proposed.

Description: Provisional interest certificate shows incorrect principal component for Q3.
Resolution: System bug identified. Manual certificate issued. IT fix deployed.

Description: Final sanction amount INR 5 lakh less than in-principle letter without prior intimation.
Resolution: LTV cap applied due to valuation difference. Detailed explanation letter issued.

Description: Collection agency making threatening calls to customer and employer despite restructured account.
Resolution: Agency terminated. Customer account flagged. RBI complaint acknowledgement shared.

Description: Relationship manager does not return calls. Customer had to visit branch 3 times for simple query.
Resolution: New RM assigned. Previous RM issued show-cause notice.

Description: Disbursement held for 8 days as CERSAI charge creation delayed.
Resolution: CERSAI charge created. Disbursement processed next business day.

Sub_Category: Pre-EMI to full EMI conversion error
Description: Customer's EMI not converted from pre-EMI to full EMI after final disbursement 2 months ago.
Resolution: Conversion completed. Revised EMI schedule generated and shared with customer.

Description: Property valuation pending for 22 days. Empanelled valuer not responsive.
Resolution: Alternate valuer assigned. Report received within 3 days.

Description: Insurance policy issued with incorrect nominee name. Needs correction.
Resolution: Correction request submitted to insurer. Updated policy expected in 7 working days.

Description: Existing customer paying 8.75% while new customers getting 8.40%. Wants parity.
Resolution: Offered conversion to new benchmark with one-time fee of INR 5900. Customer accepted.

Description: PMAY claim rejected by NHB citing Aadhaar mismatch. Customer's Aadhaar details are correct.
Resolution: Re-submitted with updated Aadhaar XML. Awaiting NHB response.

Description: BT completed but previous lender Canara Bank not issuing NOC for 30 days.
Resolution: Formal letter sent to Canara Bank. Follow-up scheduled.

Description: Part prepayment of INR 8 lakh done but tenure not recalculated in system.
Resolution: Tenure recalculated. Reduced by 14 months. Revised schedule emailed.

Description: One original title deed missing from returned document bundle after loan closure.
Resolution: Document traced in scanning unit. Original returned to customer at branch.

Description: Loan closed 3 months ago but CIBIL still showing active. Affecting new loan application.
Resolution: CIBIL closure update submitted. Reflection expected in next cycle (30 days).

Description: Branch staff provided wrong foreclosure amount leading to payment shortfall of INR 23000.
Resolution: Difference waived. Staff re-trained on foreclosure calculation process.

Description: Customer not receiving EMI debit confirmation SMS for last 3 months.
Resolution: Mobile number re-registered in DND exemption list. SMS alerts restored.

Description: Home loan rejected due to FOIR at 62%. Customer wants to add spouse as co-applicant.
Resolution: Co-applicant income added. FOIR reduced to 48%. File resubmitted.

Description: Customer asked to submit property papers 3 times due to branch misplacing them.
Resolution: Documents found in other customer's file. Apology issued. Process audit initiated.

Description: Recovery agent visited customer's office for 15-day overdue EMI. Extreme embarrassment caused.
Resolution: Agent blacklisted. Formal apology from collections head. Compensation offered.

Description: Disbursement delayed as stamp duty on loan agreement was short by INR 500. Unreasonable hold.
